title: caulokaempferia larsenii
intro: Caulokaempferia larsenii is a species of flowering plant in the ginger family, Zingiberaceae. It is native to Thailand and has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The plant's extracts have been found to possess health benefits such as reducing pain and inflammation, as well as exhibiting antimicrobial and antioxidant properties. Caulokaempferia larsenii is often prepared as an herbal remedy in the form of infusions, decoctions, or capsules, and is used to treat various ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues.
